section.heading: Cost certification

content.p: Except in the case of mortgages on multifamily rental housing projects insured under section 1748h–2 of this title, the cost certification required under section 1715r of this title shall not be required with respect to mortgages insured under the provisions of this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (June 27, 1934, ch. 847, title VIII, § 808, as added Aug. 8, 1949, ch. 403, § 1, 63 Stat. 576; amended Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 783, title IV, § 401, 69 Stat. 651; Pub. L. 86–372, title VII, § 704(b), Sept. 23, 1959, 73 Stat. 686.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1959—Pub. L. 86–372 substituted “Except in the case of mortgages on multifamily rental housing projects insured under section 1748h–2 of this title, the” for “The”.
1955—Act Aug. 11, 1955, struck out provisions requiring cost certifications.
